channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Jaguars fire coach Doug Pederson, keep GM Trent Baalke after 'best team assembled' wins just 4 games
item.description: JACKSONVILLE, Fla. (AP) — Doug Pederson is out as Jacksonville’s head coach after the franchise’s “best team assembled” won just four games. Jaguars owner Shad Khan fired Pederson on Monday, a day after a 26-23 loss at Indianapolis in overtime. It was the team’s 18th loss in its last 23 games.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jaguars fire Doug Pederson after 3 seasons
item.description: The Jacksonville Jaguars on Monday fired head coach Doug Pederson after three seasons with the team. Jacksonville finished the 2024 season 4-13.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 49ers report card: Another defensive dud ends downer season
item.description: The last-place 49ers (6-11) lost seven of their final eight and did so with a generous defense that failed to produce a takeaway in Sunday's 47-24 exit in Arizona.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Tampa Bay Buccaneers secure playoff win: Fans celebrate victory
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) — With the Bucs clinching a playoff spot, fans are fired up as they look ahead to the next steps in their postseason journey. It was a rough start for fans cheering on the Tampa Bay Buccaneers against the New Orleans Saints on the opening drives.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: BC's Stiga scores on OT breakaway to give US 2nd straight world junior title, 4-3 over Finland
item.description: OTTAWA, Ontario (AP) — Teddy Stiga scored on a breakaway at 8:04 of 3-on-3 overtime to give the United States a 4-3 victory over Finland on Sunday night in the world junior hockey championship game.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Broncos clinch playoffs after 38-0 win over Chiefs
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — They say, "It ain't how you start; it's how you finish." For the Denver Broncos, their season finale had it all—high stakes, playoff hopes, and a shot at redemption against a Kansas City Chiefs team resting most of its stars.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Lions beat Vikings 31-9, win NFC North and No. 1 seed, dropping division rivals to No. 5
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Jahmyr Gibbs was the game-breaking player the Detroit Lions needed to get their high-powered offense in gear — and give them a first-round bye and home-field advantage in the NFC playoffs.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Curry looks fresh but lacks support in Warriors’ 30-point loss to Kings
item.description: Curry led the Warriors with 26 points and didn't step foot on the court in the fourth quarter already trailing by 30 points
item.dc:creator: Evan Webeck, The Mercury News

item.title: Dolphins' frustrated Tyreek Hill appears to indicate he wants out of Miami after loss to Jets
item.description: EAST RUTHERFORD, N.J. (AP) — A frustrated Tyreek Hill might want out of Miami. The star wide receiver appeared to indicate after the Dolphins' 32-20 loss to the New York Jets on Sunday that he could want to play elsewhere next season.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Hideki Matsuyama has record-setting start to the PGA Tour season with victory at Kapalua
item.description: KAPALUA, Hawaii (AP) — Hideki Matsuyama opened the new season with a record performance, though it was hard to tell from his emotions. He was a machine at The Sentry, with 35 holes at birdie or better to finish at 35-under par, both PGA Tour records.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cowboys cheerleader drilled in head by kickoff mishap in final game of season
item.description: A Dallas Cowboys cheerleader was drilled by an errant kickoff by Brandon Aubrey during the team's loss to the Washington Commanders in the final game of the 2024 season
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bears' game-winning field goal drops Packers in NFC playoff seeding, snaps 10-game losing streak
item.description: The Chicago Bears snapped multiple losing streaks as Cairo Santos drilled a 51-yard field goal to drop the Green Bay Packers in the NFC playoff seeding.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL legend Brett Favre left 'speechless' as Biden honors Soros, Clinton with Medal of Freedom
item.description: NFL legend Brett Favre added to the scrutiny on Saturday over President Biden awarding the Presidential Medal of Freedom to Hillary Clinton and George Soros.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chicago Bulls plan to retire Derrick Rose's jersey next season
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Derrick Rose wasn't sure how he will feel when sees his No. 1 hanging from the rafters. He was still trying to process the news. The Chicago Bulls announced Saturday they plan to retire Rose's jersey sometime next season.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ravens' 355-pound lineman snags interception to clinch division title in victory vs. Browns
item.description: Baltimore Ravens defensive tackle Michael Pierce hauled in the first interception of his NFL career Saturday to close out a division-sealing victory.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chiefs' team plane stranded due to ice danger en route to Denver for game with playoff stakes vs. Broncos
item.description: The Kansas City Chiefs' team plane is stranded due to icing hazards ahead of a trip to Denver for a game that matters to three teams, but not the Chiefs.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bulls to retire Derrick Rose's No. 1 jersey
item.description: CHICAGO — The Chicago Bulls announced Saturday that the team would be retiring Derrick Rose’s No. 1 jersey next season. Bulls President & CEO Michael Reinsdorf made the announcement on Saturday morning.
item.dc:creator: Gabriel Castillo, WGN 9

item.title: Sugar Bowl postponed after deadly truck attack
item.description: NEW ORLEANS — The College Football Playoff quarterfinal at the Sugar Bowl between Georgia and Notre Dame has been postponed after a truck plowed into a New Year’s crowd about a mile away early Wednesday, killing at least 10 people.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Holiday Classic: Father Judge 80, Carlsbad 70
item.description: In the Third-Place game for the National Bracket of the 2024 Holiday Classic, Father Judge High School from Philadelphia, PA defeats Carlsbad 80-70.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Boys Basketball: Montgomery 75, Windward 74
item.description: KUSI (SAN DIEGO)-Montgomery playing in the fifth place game on Monday afternoon went to overtime for bonus basketball against Windward and won 75-74. Lead by Senior, JJ Sanchez who poured in 27. While fellow senior Devin Hamilton added 18, and Alek Sanchez, twin of JJ hit for 12.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: SDFNL All-Star Showcase
item.description:
Boys All-Star Game : Blue Stars 21- Red Stars 17
Girls Flag Football All-Star Game: Blue Stars 6 - Red Stars 0
San Diego 13U Youth Super Bowl: San Diego Bolts 34 - Oceanside Warriors 22
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5
